label: Graph Integrity

deductions.evidence: Slugs: ac-joint, axillary-nerve, clavicle, elbow-joint, proximal-humerus, upper-extremity-trauma-anatomy-hub

deductions.evidence: Disconnected: ac-joint, axillary-nerve, clavicle, elbow-joint, proximal-humerus, upper-extremity-trauma-anatomy-hub
